title: Great Pandemic of Deersheba
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}}
{{Disease

|createdby=[[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] {{C|virus carriers}}<ref name="PhraseBook">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref>

{{Quote|Of course, it should be mentioned here that the Neimoidians are notorious virus carriers. Although immune to most harmful microbes themselves, they have been the scourge of the galaxy, responsible—although they deny it—for the Great Pandemic of Deersheba and the equally lethal Intestinal Revenge of Bars Barka that created the massive weight loss that swept through the Ubese colonists.|Ebenn Q3 Baobab, ''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide''|<ref name="PhraseBook" />}}
The '''Great Pandemic of Deersheba''' was an outbreak of a [[Death/Legends|deadly]] viral infection [[Disease/Legends|disease]]<ref name="PhraseBook" /> that originated<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|other=the Great Pandemic of Deersheba|system=[[Deersheba system/Legends|Deersheba system]]|legends=1}}</ref> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Deersheba system/Legends|Deersheba system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The outbreak was caused by members of the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], who served as virus carriers for the disease, although Neimoidians themselves denied their responsibility for the event. The Great Pandemic of Deersheba was eventually mentioned by the [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] in the [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] edition of his [[Book/Legends|book]] the ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]''.<ref name="PhraseBook" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Great Pandemic of Deersheba was introduced in the [[2001]] book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], authored by [[Ben Burtt]].<ref name="PhraseBook" />
